S7 class: securetrace_sampler

Source: R/sampler.R
securetrace_sampler.Rd

S7 class: securetrace_sampler

Usage

securetrace_sampler(should_sample = function() NULL)

Arguments

should_sample

A function taking name and metadata arguments, returning TRUE to record or FALSE to drop the trace.

Value

An S7 object of class securetrace_sampler.
